# Electrical Stability Test

**Summary**: Measurement of the voltage required to break down a mud sample's electrical resistance.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-sanmi|Sanmi, 2011]] used an OFITE tester to measure the electrical stability of the mud samples.
